name: Spanish Flu (H1N1)
method: Quarantine, social distancing, no vaccine available

name: Polio
method: Salk and Sabin vaccines; global immunization campaigns

name: Smallpox
method: Global WHO vaccination campaign; ring vaccination strategy

name: Ebola (first outbreak)
method: Isolation, contact tracing, PPE; no vaccine at the time

name: HIV/AIDS
method: Antiretroviral therapy (ART); harm reduction; no cure

name: Rinderpest (cattle plague)
method: Global veterinary vaccination campaigns coordinated by FAO

name: SARS-CoV-1
method: Quarantine, contact tracing, travel restrictions; no vaccine

name: Swine Flu (H1N1 pandemic)
method: Rapid vaccine development; school closures; antiviral treatment

name: MERS-CoV
method: Isolation, healthcare infection control; no approved vaccine

name: West African Ebola
method: Ring vaccination (rVSV-ZEBOV); contact tracing; community engagement

name: Zika Virus
method: Vector control, travel advisories, public health surveillance

name: Yemen Cholera Outbreak
method: Oral rehydration therapy; oral cholera vaccine; WASH interventions

name: Kivu Ebola (DRC)
method: Ring vaccination; conflict-zone response; community trust building

name: COVID-19 (SARS-CoV-2)
method: mRNA vaccines; lockdowns; masking; antiviral therapy (Paxlovid)

name: Mpox (global outbreak)
method: JYNNEOS vaccine; contact tracing; harm reduction messaging

name: Mpox Clade I (DRC)
method: Ring vaccination; WHO PHEIC declared August 2024

name: Dengue (record global surge)
method: Vector control; Qdenga vaccine rollout; WHO grade 3 emergency

name: H3N2 Influenza (severe season)
method: Annual vaccination; antiviral treatment; surveillance via FluView
